titleStmt.title: SII 18.139: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 139. (B.K. Nos. 9 and 10 of 1933-34.) BAṄKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Right pillar at the entrance into the central shrine of the Nagarēśvaradēva temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 12th year of the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva Piṅgaḷa, Mārgaśira śu. Trayōdaśi, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1137, November 27. The week-day was Saturday and there was no saṁkrānti on that day.
It records a grant of land made by Basava-gauṇḍa and others to the god Nakarēśvaradēva of Baṅkāpura. The gift was entrusted to Chandrabhūshaṇa-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple.

Another grant for offerings to the same god made after washing the feet of the same āchārya by Bamma-gāvuṇḍa of Baṅkāpura, is also recorded. This grant was also made in the same year in the month of Pushya on Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse. These details too are irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1138, January 12. The week-day was Wednesday and there was no eclipse on that day. This record is numbered as B.K. No. 10 of 1933-34 in the An. Rep.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkamallavarṣada 12 neya piṁgaḷa
saṁvatsarada mārggaśira suddha trayōdasi Ādi
vāraduttārayaṇa (/) saṁkrānti vyatīpātadandu dharmmō
tsāhacittarāgirppinegamitta . © beḷasellaṁ kuṁda
veṁduṁ pusi pasavu baṟaṁmāri mikkirddini vyākuḷa
diṁdaṁ keṭṭa(ṁ)vellā praje dhanakanakādhiṣṭitarssōbhanaṁ nā
ḍoḷagellaṁ taṁna rājyōdayadoḷenisidī rājasarvvaṁnya
niṁnā naḷanō māndhātanō rāmanō nriganō hariścaṁ
dranō tailadēva . © Odavida mōhapāśamanadaṁ paṟi
dikki kaḷatrameṁba kaṁbhada toḍaraṁ bidircci viśayaṁgaḷaneydeṁ
kivircci rāgameṁbudadhiyanīṁṭi bandu śivayō
gasudhāṁbunadīpravāhadoḷu mudadavagā(ṁ-)
hamirddudaha caṁdravibhūśaṇagandhasiṁdhura .
© svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ
sakaḷabudhajanaprasaṁnaru dharmmalatādhāradaṁḍarumappa śrī
madunakarēśvaradēvarācāryyaṁ caṁdrabhūśaṇapaṁḍitara kare
du śrībaṁkāpurada nakarēśvaradēvarige maḍileya
beṇniya hiriya keṟeya keḷagaṇa gadde Areva
ttalu biṭṭa basavagauṁḍa . beḷḷeyara saṁkaṇa . Aṁ
ḍura kāḷiyaṇa beḷagali gētaṇa . siṁgajja . matyajja .
mōriya boppaṇa . māḷiseṭṭi . Alliya
sēnabōva nāṇiyaṇna . baisajja Inibaru sahita
vāgi baṁkāpurada nakarēśvaradēvargge Ā
dityavāra vyatīpātadaṁdu caṁdrabhūśaṇa
paṇḍitadēvargge kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi tapōdhanara Āṁnadānakke koṭṭaru . mane sa
hita I dammamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge śrīvā
raṇāsi gurukṣētradalu divyatapōdana brā
hmaṇargge Ānnadānamanikki sāsira kavileya
kōḍuṁ koḷaginali navaratnamaṁ kaṭṭisi biṭṭa pha
la . śrīvāraṇāsi gurukṣētradalu
sāsira tapōdhana sāyira kapileya
sāsira bāhmaṇaruma Aḷidanta
ha dōsamaneydidāta . I dhammama
Aḷidaṁtaha Ava paṁcamahāpā
taka . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē(ḥ) krimi .
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkamallavarṣada 12 neya piṁgaḷasaṁva
tsarada pusyadamavāse sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa
vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmatu kiṟiya baṁkāpurada baṁmmagāvuṁ
ḍa śrīmatu baṁkāpurada śrīnagarēsvaradēvargge muguḷika
ṭṭada keṟeyoḷataṭadalli śrīcaṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitadē
vara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara nivēdyakke ko
ṭṭa gadde Aravattalu . 0 0 Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipā
ḷisidavarge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu sāsira ka
pileya kōḍuṁ koḷaginalu navaratnamaṁ kaṭṭisi saha
śra brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku .
© Intī dharmmamāḷidavaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrado
ḷu sahaśra kapileymaṁ sahaśra bāhmaṇaru
maṁ sahaśra tapōdhanaranaḷida paṁcamahāpā
takanakku . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharā śaṣṭhirvvarśasahaśrāṇāṁ viṣṭā(ṁ)
yāṁ jāyatē(ḥ) krimi .
Digital edition of SII 18.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
